title: Tracer ProScribe Tool with Deep Hole Pencil, Lead Holster and Carry Case (DIY, Woodworking, and Carpentry Multi-Function Scribe Tool)
features: PERFECT MARKING KIT - The TRACER ProScribe Tool package comes with a durable, compact case, the kit also includes an accompanying TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil, 4x replacement graphite leads, 2x Yellow alternative leads (within an anti-snap lead dispencer) and TRACER Site Holsters.
15 INDIVIDUAL MARKING APPLICATIONS - The TRACER ProScribe Tool is a multi-function tool with over 15 marking applications, including Parallel Marking, Profile Scribing, Compass and more.

4 DIFFERENT MODES - The TRACER ProScribe Tool has two different parallel marking modes, one for 1-20mm marking and one for 20-100mm marking. It has a contour marking mode which offers precise marking when dealing with larger offcuts and a compass mode for simple circular marking.

EASE OF USE - Operating on a simple ratchet-style mechanism, the tool perfectly balances its many design benefits with ease of use. Each TRACER ProScribe Tool will come shipped with a simple user manual demonstrating adjust the tool to fit your needs.
VERSATILE ADJUSTING - Able to be adjusted to up to 16 fixed positions, the TRACER ProScribe Tool can be easily tuned to fit your workspace and needs.
description: Product Description TRACER ProScribe The new TRACER ProScribe is a multi-function tool with over 15 marking applications, including Parallel Marking, Profile Scribing, Compass and more The TRACER ProScribe is the perfect item for tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts looking for a marking and scribing tool that can serve multiple functions in all kinds of scenarios. With an intuitively designed ratchet-style mechanism, the user can adjust the scribe tool to one of 16 positions to best fit the job that they are working on be it hanging doors, worktops, tile flooring, plinths, and skirting. It can be used as a profile scribe tool and also a compass. When paired with the included TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil, the ProScribe is effective when marking on wood, metal, plastic, and ceramics. The extendable and retractable pencil lead can further assist in gaining greater precision when marking out offcuts and parallel measurements. New to the market in 2018, TRACER professional marking products have been specifically designed for the construction industry, offering the perfect mark for all trade professionals. Four different modes to fit many different jobs 1-20mm Parallel Marking Mode The 1-20mm Parallel Marking Mode is perfect for accurate marking of parallel lines especially when needing to trim down small measures of materials for the perfect fit. 20-100mm Parallel Marking Mode The 20-100mm Parallel Marking Mode allows users to mark longer distance offset parallel lines while maintaining the accuracy needed for professional working. Contour Marking Mode Use the ProScribe in contour marking mode for more precise marking when dealing with larger offcuts. Keep at a 90-degree right angle for the best result. In this mode, the ProScribe becomes the ideal profile scribe tool. Compass Mode Adjust the ProScribe into compass mode to achieve smooth circular markings for precision working. What is included... Unique to the TRACER ProScribe is that each tool will come shipped in a high-quality carry case set with a TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil which is the perfect fit for the TRACER ProScribe, 4x Replacement Leads and 2x Alternative Yellow Leads for darker surfaces. Included with each set is a step-by-step user guide with information on how to transition the TRACER ProScribe from one mode to another as well as the most effective use for each. TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil Included The TRACER ProScribe tool comes accompanied by the TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil, a retractable pencil with interchangeable leads which is perfect for Carpenters, Joiners, Kitchen Fitters, and overall DIY Enthusiasts alike. Being able to reach depths of 100mm in a 3mm hole or 145mm in a 6mm hole, the TRACER Deep Hole Construction Pencil can satisfy even working on the most awkward of jobs. With an inbuilt sharpener, site holster, and metal shaft fit for the wear and tear of any working environment, this is the only marking pencil you will ever want on your hip. TRACER ProScribe Tool Specifications Length 150mm Width 54mm Height/Thickness 16mm / 105mm (Pencil Holder Extended) Weight 50g (Packaging Included)
